name: Tennant Company
description: Founded in 1870 and headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Tennant Company is a world-leading designer, manufacturer, and marketer of solutions that empower customers to achieve quality cleaning performance. The company provides a comprehensive range of floor cleaning machines, including robotic scrubbers and sweepers, as well as innovative cleaning technologies, parts, and service plans. Serving diverse industries such as manufacturing, healthcare, retail, and warehousing, Tennant focuses on creating cleaner, safer, and healthier environments while helping organizations reduce their environmental impact through sustainable and efficient cleaning equipment and asset management solutions.
